zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings於1235年4月出生在英國諾福爾可阿希爾時，他的父親Henry de Hastings39歲，母親Ada Huntingdon40歲。他於大約1261年與Joane de Cantilupe在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1264年登記服兵役。他於1265年被列為constable of winchester castle。他去世於1269年3月5日在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings于1235年4月出生在英国諾福爾可阿希爾时，他的父亲Henry de Hastings39岁，母亲Ada Huntingdon40岁。他于大约1261年与Joane de Cantilupe在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1264年登记服兵役。他于1265年被列为constable of winchester castle。他去世于1269年3月5日在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings was born in April 1235, in Ashill, Norfolk, England, his father, Henry de Hastings, was 39 and his mother, Ada Huntingdon, was 40. He married Joane de Cantilupe about 1261, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1264. In 1265, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as constable of winchester castle. He died on 5 March 1269, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings est né en avril 1235, à Ashill, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Hastings, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ada Huntingdon, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Cantilupe environ 1261, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1264. En 1265, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of winchester castle. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1269, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings im April 1235 in Ashill, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Hastings 39 und seine Mutter Ada Huntingdon 40. Er hat um 1261 in England Joane de Cantilupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1264 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1265, als er 30 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of winchester castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. März 1269 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Coventry, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings è nato il nel aprile 1235 nel Ashill, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Henry de Hastings, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ada Huntingdon, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joane de Cantilupe circa 1261, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1264. Nel 1265, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of winchester castle. Morì il 5 marzo 1269, nel Coventry, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsが1235年4月にイギリスノーフォルクアシュイルで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastingsは39歳，母Ada Huntingdonは40歳であった。約1261年にイギリスでJoane de Cantilupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1264年に兵役登録をした。1265年，30歳の時，職業はconstable of winchester castleと記録されている。彼は1269年3月5日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(이)가 1235년 4월 영국 노르폴크 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Hastings(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada Huntingdon(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1261년 영국에서 Joane de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1265년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of winchester castle이었다. 그는 1269년 3월 5일 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings nasceu em abril de 1235, em Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Hastings, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ada Huntingdon, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Cantilupe aproximadamente 1261, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1264. Em 1265, com 30 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of winchester castle. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1269, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings родился апрель 1235 г. в местности ашилл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Hastings было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Huntingdon, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Cantilupe около 1261 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1265 году, в возрасте 30 лет, работал по профессии constable of winchester castle. Он умер 5 марта 1269 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings nació en abril de 1235, en Ashill, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Hastings, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ada Huntingdon, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Joane de Cantilupe aproximadamente 1261, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1264. En 1265, a la edad de 30 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of winchester castle. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1269, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
